title: oxystophyllum oblongum
intro: Oxystophyllum oblongum, also known as the oblong Oxystophyllum, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Guinea. It is a terrestrial orchid with various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oxystophyllum oblongum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Oxystophyllum oblongum can be found in the form of extracts and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine for their medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
